update gate.entity_description: The update gate (z t) in a GRU determines how much of the previous output should be retained and how much new input information should be incorporated into the current output. It plays a crucial role in managing the memory of the network.

input x t.entity_description: The input vector (x t) represents the current input data at time step t in a sequence. It is used by the GRU to process and generate outputs based on the learned patterns from previous time steps.
